name: The Synapse
subtitle: Where women connect mind, machine, and what comes next

fiscalSponsor.name: Applied Love Labs
fiscalSponsor.blurb: The Synapse is hosted by Applied Love Labs / TILT. Charitable contributions flow through ALL, which issues tax-deductible receipts in its own name.

mission: The Synapse convenes women working at the edges of consciousness research, cognitive neuroscience, philosophy of mind, and machine intelligence. We gather not to perform expertise but to think together -- a small, invitation-shaped conversation where early-career researchers sit at the same table as senior scholars.
